# GitHub Repository Professional Setup - AI Agent Prompt

**Mission**: Transform this repository to match the professional quality of [chf3198/copilot-handoff](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff).

---

## Your Reference Example

Study **[copilot-handoff](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff)** as your gold standard. Examine:
- Repository structure and file organization
- Documentation style, depth, and formatting
- GitHub configuration and enabled features
- Automation and security setup

## Research Resources

- [GitHub Community Health Guidelines](https://docs.github.com/en/communities/setting-up-your-project-for-healthy-contributions)
- [opensource.guide](https://opensource.guide/) - Open source best practices
- [Awesome README](https://github.com/matiassingers/awesome-readme) - Examples of excellent READMEs

## Quality Standards

### Documentation
Create comprehensive, professional documentation that matches or exceeds copilot-handoff quality:
- **README**: 400-600+ lines with complete project overview, features, installation, usage, configuration, and FAQ
- **CONTRIBUTING**: 400-500+ lines with setup, development workflow, testing, and PR process
- **Community Health**: CODE_OF_CONDUCT, SECURITY, SUPPORT, ROADMAP, CHANGELOG
- **Templates**: Issue templates (bug/feature), PR template, CODEOWNERS, FUNDING.yml

Use copilot-handoff's structure, emoji usage, and formatting as your template. Adapt content to this project's specific needs.

### GitHub Configuration
Configure repository settings to professional standards:
- **Visibility**: Public with compelling emoji-enhanced description
- **Topics**: 10-15 relevant tags for discoverability
- **Features**: Enable Issues, Projects, Discussions
- **Security**: Dependabot (weekly updates), CodeQL scanning, secret scanning
- **Branch Protection**: Require PR reviews, status checks, Code Owners approval

### Automation
Set up automated workflows:
- Dependabot for dependency updates (npm, GitHub Actions)
- CodeQL for security scanning
- CI/CD workflows appropriate for the project type

## Implementation

1. **Study**: Thoroughly examine copilot-handoff repository structure and files
2. **Create**: Write all documentation files adapting copilot-handoff's quality and style
3. **Automate**: Set up `.github/` automation files (dependabot.yml, workflows/codeql.yml)
4. **Configure**: Use GitHub CLI (`gh`) to automate repository settings where possible
5. **Verify**: Ensure final result matches copilot-handoff's professional quality

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Documentation is comprehensive (README 400+ lines, CONTRIBUTING 400+ lines)
- [ ] All community health files present and complete
- [ ] Repository properly tagged with 10-15 relevant topics
- [ ] Security automation configured (Dependabot, CodeQL)
- [ ] Repository settings match professional standards
- [ ] Issue/PR templates created
- [ ] Overall quality matches or exceeds copilot-handoff reference
